description: Create a GitHub Actions release workflow that triggers on push of tags matching v[0-9]+.[0-9]+.[0-9]+, on a scheduled cron job, and on workflow dispatch with an optional tag_name input. The workflow has three jobs: Linux, macOS, and Windows, each building a release for their respective OS and architecture. The jobs use Conan and CMake to install dependencies, build, and package the release. Artifacts are uploaded for each job. A subsequent publish job waits for all previous jobs to complete, determines the release tag name based on the event type, and creates a GitHub release with the artifacts.
